title: Salty Crunchy Russian Tomatoes Blini
description: A post-workout Russian dish featuring crispy blini topped with vine tomatoes and confit-tomato for a salty and satisfying snack.
instructions: Combine flour, sugar, and yeast in a large mixing bowl.
Gradually add warm water, mixing until a dough forms.
Knead the dough for 5 minutes until smooth.
Place the dough in a greased bowl, cover with plastic wrap, and let rise in a warm place for 1 hour.
Preheat a non-stick skillet or griddle over medium heat.
Divide the dough into 6-8 equal pieces and roll each piece into a ball.
Flatten each ball into a disk using a rolling pin.
Cook the blini for 2-3 minutes on each side, until golden brown and crispy.
While the blini are cooking, chop the vine tomatoes and confit-tomato.

Assemble the blini by spreading a tablespoon of melted butter on top of each blini, followed by a spoonful of chopped tomatoes and confit-tomato, a sprinkle of parsley, a pinch of black pepper, and a crumble of feta cheese.
Sprinkle sunflower seeds on top for added crunch.
